reviews.comment:
Tremendo cómo bajo la calidad de este ACA. Una pena. Las milanesas, que estaban buenísimas, ahora las hacen desganadas, con aceite quemado. Ya no hacen más puré de papas. Renuevan constantemente el personal. Perdió identidad mi parada firme camino a Córdoba

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame how much the quality at this ACA has declined. The breaded cutlets, which used to be delicious, are now made half-heartedly, with burnt oil. They don't even make mashed potatoes anymore. They're constantly changing staff. My go-to stop on the way to Córdoba has lost its charm.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRelltSlJBEAE
